title: MJ's Better 3D Tools & Weapons
description: a 3D look for Minecraft items. Includes enchantment and durability dependant textures. By Mickey Joe
body:
I made better 3D tools for my main pack, "Mickey Joe's Barely Default", and this pack will be a port of the better 3D items I make!

Right now it's just tools and weapons. I'm going to expand this to other items too.

Enjoy the enchantment, durability, and keybind-dependent models of this pack!


FULL SHOWCASE: (by me)
